contract.goal: Fix reqwest issue #2989 in the blocking request conversion. TryFrom<http::Request<T>> for reqwest::blocking::Request preserves method, URI, headers, and body but silently discards other semantically meaningful request parts. Make it consistent with the asynchronous conversion by preserving the HTTP version and type-map extensions as well. Work offline, do not inspect git history or any remote, do not modify tests or documentation, and make a focused production-quality change. Run relevant tests before finishing.
